title: Software Development Engineer - AI / LLM Systems (Python Backend)
company_focus: Software consulting and AI-powered application development
description:
Company: Volga Partners  Location: Fully Remote (Occasional
office visits 1–2 times/year) Compensation: ₹23–₹30 LPA
(based on experience) Job Type: Full-time Start Date:
Urgently hiring — must be available to start within 1–2
weeks Work Hours: 8 AM – 5 PM IST or 9 AM – 6 PM IST
(Collaboration with USA Pacific Time teams)

About the Role

Volga Partners is looking for a skilled Software Development
Engineer with strong expertise in Python backend systems and
AI/LLM applications.

In this role, you will build and maintain production-grade
AI-powered systems, integrating large language models into
real-world workflows. You will work across backend services,
orchestration layers, and data pipelines—ensuring that AI
features are reliable, scalable, and performant.

This is a hands-on engineering role requiring strong
problem-solving, system design, and the ability to operate
in fast-evolving AI environments.

Key Responsibilities

- Build and maintain backend services and internal tools in
  Python for AI-powered applications.

- Integrate LLM APIs into production workflows, including
  prompt handling, response processing, validation, and
  retries.

- Design and implement scalable REST APIs, async workflows,
  and background job systems.

- Maintain and enhance components of a multi-language codebase
  (C#/C++, Python, web technologies) where applicable.

- Work with structured and unstructured data to prepare
  inputs, transform outputs, and support downstream systems.

- Develop systems for prompt management, model routing,
  response validation, and failure handling.

- Debug complex issues across backend logic, API integrations,
  and distributed services.

- Monitor system performance using telemetry tools and
  proactively identify and resolve bottlenecks.

- Automate recurring workflows related to data processing,
  evaluation, and reporting.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to turn ambiguous
  product ideas into production-ready features.

- Contribute to architecture decisions around scalability,
  performance, and safe use of AI systems.

- Write clean, testable, and maintainable code while helping
  establish engineering best practices for AI systems.

What You Bring

Education

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field.

Experience

- 3+ years of professional experience in backend or systems
  engineering.

- Strong experience in Python development for production
  systems.

- Experience integrating LLM APIs or AI-driven services into
  real applications.

- Proven ability to work within large codebases and
  collaborative environments.

Technical Skillset

Core Skills

- Python (strong), backend system design, API development

- Async workflows, job queues, and service orchestration

- Debugging across APIs, services, and data pipelines

Languages

- Python, C#, C/C++, JavaScript/TypeScript, SQL

Frameworks & Libraries

- .NET Web API, ASP.NET (MVC & WebForms), Entity Framework

- React, Bootstrap, Ajax

- Testing frameworks (xUnit or similar)

AI / LLM Systems

- Prompt design, response parsing, and guardrails

- Model integration patterns and failure handling

- Understanding of LLM limitations and production constraints

Tools & Platforms

- Azure DevOps, Git, Docker, Terraform

- SQL Server or similar databases

- Elastic Stack, Postman, Swagger

- AWS or Azure cloud environments

Architecture

- Microservices, distributed systems, modular architectures

Operating Systems

- Windows, Linux

Build Tools

- Make, Ninja (preferred)

Nice to Have

- Experience with RAG, embeddings, vector databases, or
  retrieval systems

- Familiarity with agent workflows or multi-step orchestration

- Experience with model monitoring, prompt versioning, or
  evaluation systems

- Understanding of AI safety, privacy, and secure data
  handling

- Exposure to cloud-native deployments and scalable
  infrastructure

Why Join Us

- Remote-first culture with minimal in-person requirements

- Work with global teams on cutting-edge AI systems

- Opportunity to build real-world LLM applications at scale

- High ownership, fast-moving environment with strong growth
  potential

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role directly involves integrating LLM APIs into
production workflows, building prompt management systems,
model routing, response validation, and developing AI-
powered backend systems. The engineer is hands-on with LLM
integration patterns and building production AI systems,
making it ai-first.
